nodes.name: Yellow-bellied tanager
nodes.summary: The yellow-bellied tanager (Ixothraupis xanthogastra) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Amazon Basin's western half. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: Ixothraupis
nodes.summary: Ixothraupis（Ixothraupis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Dotted tanager、Rufous-throated tanager、Speckled tanager等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
